# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Flexible Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Custom shell command to run for the build process'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No custom build command provided. Using default." && echo "Default build command executed."'
        type: string

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Display custom build command
        run: |
          echo "Executing custom build command:"
          echo "${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}"

      - name: Run custom build command
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}
        shell: bash
